calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2015 Off Calendar

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
VERIRIFIED APPLICATION OF SUSAN E. FOSTER TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFF TRULIA, INCORPORATED is taken Off calendar. Case dismissed. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Mar-12-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Charles H. Samel, Esq. of Perkins Coie, Tel. 310.788.3214, for plaintiff and moving party;
Richard L. Stone, Esq. of Jenner & Block, Tel. 213.239.2203, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel contested the Court's tentative ruling. The matter was argued. After hearing, the Court vacates its tentative ruling and the hearing re: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PLAINTIFF TRULIA, INC.'S REQUEST FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is off calendar as the parties have reached an agreement. The settlement is pursuant to CCP 664.6 and may be enforced accordingly. Parties are to submit a proposed order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489.
